untranslatable_reason: Signal requires dynamic portfolio weight scaling inversely proportional to realized volatility (e.g., weight = 1/volatility). The allowed indicators and operators do not support position sizing calculations or dynamic weight adjustments. hvol_20 can detect volatility levels for entry/exit timing, but the core requirement—scaling portfolio exposure by 1/σ—cannot be expressed in the condition-based rule format.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy: Used hvol_20 (20-period historical volatility) as a volatility measure. Entry when volatility is low (inverse weighting concept), exit when it rises. However, this is a simplified entry/exit timing rule and does NOT capture the true volatility-managed scaling mechanic where portfolio weight = k/σ_mkt,t. The signal fundamentally requires position sizing logic outside the scope of this condition-based engine.
